name: World Elite Credit Card
url: https://www.banquemisr.com/Home/SMEs/Retail Banking/Pages/Cards/Credit Cards Pages/World Elite Credit Card
description: Promotions and discounts in the fanciest shopping centers inside and outside Egypt which are specified in Priceless Specials application for Master Card Credit Cards
full_text:
World Elite Credit Card


--- Rewards Program:- ---

• Promotions and discounts in the fanciest shopping centers inside and outside Egypt which are specified in Priceless Specials application for Master Card Credit Cards
• Use your Mastercard World Elite Credit Card to Book your next holiday on booking.com and enjoy up to 7% wallet credit across hundreds of thousands of properties locally and around the world
• Enjoy an exclusive 10% discount when you book your preferred ride with Rentalcars.com using your MasterCard World Elite
• Order online with Carrefour with your Mastercard World Elite to enjoy 20% off shopping orders once per month. enter promo code MA20 at check out
• Get a 20% discount on Talabat delivery service every month by using the promocode MASTERCARD.
• Enjoy 10% off car rental when booking on Rentalcars.com with your Mastercard World Elite.
• Use your Mastercard when you travel and get some of your money back at your favorite destinations. No coupons, just rewards. Visit priceless.com/mtr and start exploring the offers
• Airport Fast Track service across top Europe, Turkey & Asia destinations with your World Elite Mastercard card. Download Mastercard Travel Pass App now and book your complimentary fast track pass.
• Get up to 25% off flights and hotels bookings on Flyin with your Mastercard card and enjoy your next trip
• Unlock 20% off at Jaz Hotels across Egypt when booking with your World/World Elite Mastercard. Use code MCDEAL at checkout. T&Cs apply.
• Get up to 4 complimentary food and/or drink items from Costa coffee when traveling from an airport in Dubai. Download the Mastercard Travel Pass App from Google Play or Apple Store and enjoy your complimentary coffee or food
• Enjoy up to 35% off your next car rental with Avis & complimentary Avis President’s Club membership. Visit avisworld.com/mastercardmea and book with your Mastercard World Elite.
• Stay connected anytime, from anywhere. Download the Flexiroam app and register to your complimentary data roaming plan with your eligible Mastercard card.
• Free SMS service after each card transaction in addition to issuing a monthly transactions statement showing the debit value and minimum payment limit as well as credit card issuance or renewal
• Installment payment for card purchase transactions and cash withdrawals up to 36 months with special interest rate
• Enjoy interest-free installments up to 60 months for purchases at many merchants
• Purchasing using Contactless technology to make your shopping safe, fast and easy
• Unlimited free access to over 1200 airport lounges worldwide by downloading the Mastercard Travel Pass app from the App Store or Play Store and registering with your Mastercard World Elite card.
• International usage is available after 2 months for credit cards following their date of issuance.
• Earn 3.5 points per each EGP spent locally and internationally.
• Earned points can be redeemed through various ways: Electronic Vouchers: Use your points to generate E-vouchers through BM online redeemable at participating merchant outlets. Instant Redemption: Instantly redeem your points at selected partner merchants without need for E-voucher issuance. Cashback: Convert your points into cash and transfer the value directly to your Banque Misr card.
• Electronic Vouchers: Use your points to generate E-vouchers through BM online redeemable at participating merchant outlets.
• Instant Redemption: Instantly redeem your points at selected partner merchants without need for E-voucher issuance.
• Cashback: Convert your points into cash and transfer the value directly to your Banque Misr card.
• For more information please visit: Banquemisr - BM Rewards Club
• To be able to manage your points please log into BM online or visit: www.bmrewardsclub.com . Terms and conditions applied.


--- Usage limits ---

Usage limits | Details
Limit of Online Purchasing Inside Egypt | Within the card credit limits with Maximum 800,000 EGP per Month with a limit of 20 times daily
Limit of Online Purchasing Outside Egypt (In case the customer has not informed the bank of the travel) (within the monthly purchase limit outside Egypt) | 200,000 EGP Monthly with a limit of 15 times daily
Contactless purchase limit without pin inside Egypt | 600 EGP per transaction with maximum 15 consecutive transaction
Contactless purchase limit without pin outside Egypt | Equivalent to 50 USD per transaction with maximum 15 consecutive Transaction
Local purchase transactions | Within the credit limits of the card
International purchase transactions (In case the customer has informed the bank of the travel) (E-commerce - POS) | 500,000 EGP Monthly
International monthly purchase limit (in case the customer hasn’t informed the bank of the travel) | 200,000 EGP Monthly
Local cash withdrawals (ATM) | EGP 30,000 Daily
P.O.S cash withdrawal from BM Branches | with max.limit 250,000
International cash withdrawals (In case the customer has informed the bank of the travel) | 6,000 EGP monthly


--- Credit Limit ---

Card Program | Credit Limit
For secured cards | Starting from EGP 300,000 to EGP 3,000,000
For unsecured cards | Starting from EGP 300,000 to EGP 1,500,000


--- Fees and charges ---

Fees and charges | Details
Issuance | EGP 8,000
Renewal | EGP 8,000
Supplementary cards issuance and renewal | EGP 1,000
Reissuance of a replacement for lost /damaged card | EGP 500
Cash withdrawals through BM ATMs and P.O.S and Other Banks’ machines within Egypt | 2% of the amount withdrawn with minimum EGP 15
Inquiry about the available balance via BM ATMs | Free
Inquiry about the available balance via other banks ATMs inside Egypt | EGP 1 per transaction
Inquiry about the available balance via ATMs outside Egypt | EGP 3 per transaction
Interest rate | 4% monthly
Penalty for delay | EGP 75
Exceeding credit limit | EGP 75
Cash withdrawals outside Egypt | 3% of the transaction’s value + EGP 50 per transaction
Commission for transactions outside Egypt (cash withdrawals – purchases) | 3% of the transaction’s value
Disputing on any transaction through (Fax, Email or Call Centre) where it is proven that the customer is not entitled to dispute on such transaction | EGP 50
Printing certified transactions statement starting from the following month | EGP 20
Requesting clearance letter, certificate of indebtedness or to whom it may concern letter | EGP 50
Upgraded credit cards fees | 50% of the issuance fees (first three years)


--- Purchases and Cash Withdrawals Installments ---

In case the customer wishes to pay-on installment for a processed transaction, then the following procedures shall be applied:

• Cash withdrawal transaction is carried out through credit card according to the card available balance
• During the performance of cash withdrawal transaction BM call center will be contacted in order to request the installment of transaction.
• Early repayment fees of 4% are applied in case the customer has paid the value of his installment.
• Cash withdrawal charges calculated on the customer’s credit card and related to the amount requested to be paid-on installment will be refunded.

Tenor (Months) | Interest Rate on Purchases and Cash Withdrawals:
3 | 2.81%
6 | 2.77%
9 | 2.76%
12 | 2.73%
18 | 2.67%
24 | 2.63%
36 | 2.56%
